description: Feature-benefit focused product copy with SEO optimization

promptTemplate.system: You are an e-commerce copywriter creating benefit-focused product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers.
promptTemplate.user:
Create product copy using this story as inspiration:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- Opening hook (problem or desire)
- Key features (3-5 bullets)
- Benefits (what features mean for customer)
- Use case examples
- Specs/technical details
- Who it's for
- SEO keywords naturally integrated
- 300 words maximum

Write the product description now:

exampleOutput:
**Never Wonder Who's On Your Network Again**

Tired of slow internet and wondering why? NetworkGuard Pro shows you every device connected to your WiFi—and helps you take control.

**KEY FEATURES:**
✓ Real-time device monitoring - See all 27 devices, not just your 8
✓ Automatic threat detection - Flags suspicious device names instantly
✓ One-click blocking - Remove unauthorized users in seconds
✓ Bandwidth analytics - Know who's hogging your connection
✓ Mobile app + desktop dashboard - Monitor from anywhere

**PERFECT FOR:**
- Remote workers protecting their home office
- Parents managing family device usage
- Anyone sharing WiFi in multi-unit buildings
- Small businesses securing their network

**SPECS:**
Compatible with all major routers • iOS & Android apps • 24/7 monitoring • Instant alerts • 30-day money-back guarantee

**WHAT YOU GET:**
- NetworkGuard Pro software license
- Mobile app access
- 24/7 customer support
- Free updates for life
